{
  "name": "relay",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Local-first Codex-driven kanban desktop app.",
  "main": "./out/main/index.js",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "electron-vite dev",
    "dev:logs": "electron-vite dev 2>&1 | tee /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "build": "tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build",
    "logs": "mkdir -p \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay\" && touch \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\" && tail -n 200 -f \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\"",
    "logs:dev": "touch /tmp/relay-dev.log && tail -n 200 -f /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "preview": "electron-vite preview",
    "test": "node tests/run-tests.mjs",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },

    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

I have enough context now. The path I’m taking is: expose a non-blocking `projects:gitMetadata` IPC backed by the existing service, fetch/cache metadata in the renderer separately from project/board reads, render compact pills in the sidebar and selected project header, then add backend parsing tests plus component rendering tests.

payload.text:
Implemented Git metadata in the Relay project UI.

Summary of changes:
- Added structured `GitMetadata` types and `projects:gitMetadata` IPC/preload API.
- Added backend Git metadata provider with porcelain status parsing, caching, detached HEAD handling, missing path/non-Git/Git unavailable/error states.
- Added compact Git metadata pills in the project sidebar and selected project header.
- Metadata loads asynchronously and refreshes on project list refresh, project selection/open, and window focus.
- Added focused backend parsing/status tests and UI rendering tests.

Files changed:
- `src/shared/types.ts`
- `src/main/index.ts`
- `src/main/services/git.ts`
- `src/preload/index.ts`
- `src/renderer/src/App.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/components/GitMetadata.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/styles.css`
- `tests/git-metadata.test.tsx`
- `tests/run-tests.mjs`

Commands run:
- Project inspection with `find`, `grep`, `sed`, `git status`, `git diff`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`

Tests run:
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npm test`: passed, 25/25 tests

Remaining risks/follow-up:
- No live file watcher was added; metadata refreshes on the requested open/focus/list-refresh events.

payload.finalResponse:
Implemented Git metadata in the Relay project UI.

Summary of changes:
- Added structured `GitMetadata` types and `projects:gitMetadata` IPC/preload API.
- Added backend Git metadata provider with porcelain status parsing, caching, detached HEAD handling, missing path/non-Git/Git unavailable/error states.
- Added compact Git metadata pills in the project sidebar and selected project header.
- Metadata loads asynchronously and refreshes on project list refresh, project selection/open, and window focus.
- Added focused backend parsing/status tests and UI rendering tests.

Files changed:
- `src/shared/types.ts`
- `src/main/index.ts`
- `src/main/services/git.ts`
- `src/preload/index.ts`
- `src/renderer/src/App.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/components/GitMetadata.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/styles.css`
- `tests/git-metadata.test.tsx`
- `tests/run-tests.mjs`

Commands run:
- Project inspection with `find`, `grep`, `sed`, `git status`, `git diff`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm test`

Tests run:
- `npm run typecheck`: passed
- `npm test`: passed, 25/25 tests

Remaining risks/follow-up:
- No live file watcher was added; metadata refreshes on the requested open/focus/list-refresh events.
